title: Smart Device Monitoring Dashboard
description: Interactive dashboard displaying connected device information in real time.
challenge: Managing large API datasets efficiently while keeping the interface responsive.
solution: Separated display components from data handling, reused status cards, and kept filtering logic predictable for large lists.

title: Business Portfolio Website
description: A responsive business website with project galleries, routed pages, and contact flows.
challenge: Balancing visual presentation with fast navigation and simple content updates.
solution: Built reusable page sections and kept the routing structure clear for future pages.

title: Task Management Application
description: Task workflow interface with CRUD operations, search, filters, and state management.
challenge: Keeping task state consistent across list, detail, and filter views.
solution: Centralized shared state and designed compact reusable controls for repeated task actions.

title: Expense Tracker
description: Personal expense tool with analytics, category filtering, and local persistence.
challenge: Making stored data easy to review without requiring a backend service.
solution: Used local storage for persistence and simple summaries for category-level insight.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: Weather interface with location search, live forecasts, and responsive views.
challenge: Presenting changing API data in a compact mobile-friendly layout.
solution: Organized current conditions and forecast cards into clear, scannable sections.

title: Movie Explorer
description: Movie discovery app with search, filtering, and detail pages.
challenge: Helping users browse large result sets without overwhelming the interface.
solution: Combined search, category filters, and routed detail views for focused exploration.
